hero.title: Find a Land Parcel and Connect with
hero.subtitle: Sign in, search for a parcel by city, region, or cadastral code, and send a message to the owner directly.
hero.trustPrivacy: Owner's personal info is not publicly visible
hero.trustMessage: The owner decides whether to contact you
hero.parcelsCountDescription: If you wish, you can contact their owners

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps — from creating an account to contacting the owner
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign in to the platform so you can search for land parcels and contact their owners.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Find a land parcel by city, region, or cadastral code.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Leave your message and contact info. If the owner is interested, they'll reach out to you.

cta.title: Land Not on the Market?
cta.text1: That doesn't mean it's not for sale. Many owners are open to hearing a good offer.
cta.text2: LandLedger lets you express interest and connect with the owner directly.

auth.passwordHint: Min 8 characters, uppercase, lowercase, special character
auth.errorDuplicateEmail: An account with this email already exists. Sign in with email/password, or delete the old account.

dashboard.title: Parcels
dashboard.noResultsDesc: Try a different filter or clear your search

parcel.privateContactDesc: The owner has not made contact info public

contact.successDesc: The owner received your message by email.
contact.disclaimer: LandLedger only forwards the message to the land owner. The platform does not participate in property transactions.

profileForm.photoCardSubtitle: Upload a photo that will appear on your profile.
profileForm.personalCardSubtitle: Fill in your basic personal details.
profileForm.contactCardSubtitle: This information is used to get in touch with you.
profileForm.privacyCardSubtitle: Choose which information is visible to other users.
profileForm.emailHint: Used for notifications and account security
profileForm.showNameHint: Other users will be able to see your name and surname on the parcel page
profileForm.showAvatarHint: Other users will be able to see your profile photo
profileForm.showPhoneHint: Other users will be able to see your number on the parcel page
profileForm.showEmailHint: Other users will be able to see your email — to send you a message
profileForm.showAddressHint: Your physical address will appear on the parcel page
profileForm.showGenderHint: Other users will be able to see your gender
profileForm.showBirthDateHint: Other users will be able to see your date of birth
profileForm.showPersonalIdHint: Other users will be able to see your personal ID number
profileForm.privacyExplainer: These settings control what information is visible to other users when they view your parcel. Fields that are turned off will only appear to you.
profileForm.contactRequired: Phone or email — at least one is required so others can contact you.

deleteAccount.permanentDesc: This action is irreversible. Profile, all parcels and history will be permanently deleted.

contactPage.title: Contact Us
contactPage.subtitle: Questions, suggestions or collaboration — we're ready to listen.
contactPage.about1: Our platform is designed to easily and securely connect potential land buyers with owners.
contactPage.about2: Often a land parcel is not officially for sale, but many owners can consider an offer if the terms are interesting. This is the idea behind our service — we give people the opportunity to find a specific parcel and contact its owner directly to express interest.
contactPage.about3: On our site you can search for land parcels by city, region or cadastral code. When you find an interesting parcel, you can easily send a message to its owner.
contactPage.about4: The platform is designed so that landowners' personal data is protected. Buyers cannot see owners' personal details — communication starts only with a message, and further contact is entirely up to the owner.
